title: TechStack HQ Renovation
testimonial: We needed a complete transformation without shutting down operations. Groove Infra phased the project perfectly — teams barely noticed the disruption. The result has improved employee satisfaction scores significantly.
description: Live renovation of a 25,000 sq ft technology company headquarters across 3 floors, completed in live operational phases. Scope included new collaborative zones, upgraded server room, executive floor redesign, town hall auditorium, café and recreation area, and complete M&E upgrade.
